fieldValues.value: RFC-009 Change C: Add description and vocabulary-backed tags on Container

Container gains normative description?: string (boundary label). Container tags?: string[] aligns with RFC-006 vocabulary substrate: when a Vocabulary declares Terms for a tag key, tags MUST resolve against those Terms (I-65). Free-string tags valid when no Vocabulary governs the key. Containers continue to carry no typed fieldValues and do not participate in the Relation graph (Invariant 20 unchanged).
description was already in the Rust implementation but not formally specified. tags follow the RFC-006 emergent vocabulary pattern: free strings are valid baseline; Vocabulary overlays curation.
